_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to effectively manage personnel supporting a project or operation.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to identify and develop data and AI leadership talent within the organization, recognizing potential across diverse backgrounds and building leadership pipelines that strengthen organizational capability.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-A-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-007 (LS, cosine: 0.513), TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.498).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.1/10 (raw 0.212). Shared vocabulary: [ability]. DCWF-only terms [effectively, manage, operation, personnel, project, supporting] vs WIDAI-only terms [across, ai, backgrounds, building, capability, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.891, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.030 — the DCWF element's 10 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 26 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (90.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Ability to effectively manage personnel supporting a project or operation." and "Ability to identify and develop data and AI leadership talent within the organiz". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.523 > STS 0.212 (gap +0.311). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ability] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Shared tokens: [ability]. DCWF-only: [effectively, manage, operation, personnel, project, supporting]. WIDAI-only: [across, ai, backgrounds, building, capability, data].
